title: Delete App
content:
# Delete App

Permanently delete all versions of an App in the App Registry. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

## Endpoint

`POST /appregistry/{app_name}/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.deprecated_app_registry.deleteLegacyApp()
print(response)

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: App Registry App key `name` to delete. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
